title: Amauropelta oaxacana
taxonomy: Amauropelta oaxacana is classified within the family Thelypteridaceae. This fern species belongs to the genus Amauropelta and is native to Mexico. The genus Amauropelta is part of the order Polypodiales and class Polypodiopsida. These classifications place Amauropelta oaxacana within the broader division of vascular plants. Further research into Amauropelta oaxacana may provide more specific and detailed classifications.

This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce stress and improve overall well-being.
